# ThermaForge Partners

> Fractional operating partner for HVAC owners scaling toward recap or sale. Annual engagements with geographic exclusivity. Built around the Carson Systems platform stack — Routebook ERP, Frontline AI, multi-platform content engine.

## What ThermaForge does

ThermaForge Partners is an operating-partner firm for $5M-and-up HVAC shops. Not a consulting firm. Not a marketing agency. The partners sit in the dispatch room, the AR review, the technician retention interviews, the tech recruiting calls. Operating-partner work, paid on retainer plus equity aligned to the recap multiple.

## Who it's for

- HVAC owners doing $5M+ in annual revenue
- Owners 12 to 48 months from a recap, sale, or generational succession
- Owners who need ops uplift, real lead pipeline, and tech recruiting infrastructure — not another agency selling clicks
- Markets: United States, with geographic exclusivity guaranteed in the engaged metro

## Engagements

ThermaForge Operate — $8,000 per month plus equity. Annual engagement.
- Operating partner work — Zach Rains in the building
- Search-intent lead pipeline routed to your project managers
- Routebook field service ERP, fully bundled (retail $1,499/mo)
- Profit-improvement, team-building, recruiting funnel buildout
- Pre-PE positioning and recap-readiness
- Geographic exclusivity in your metro
- Best fit: $5M-$15M HVAC shops needing operational lift and qualified call volume.

ThermaForge Scale — $14,500 per month plus equity. Annual engagement.
- Everything in Operate
- Frontline AI — 24/7 phone coverage, books appointments, captures leads
- Multi-platform content engine — X, Instagram, TikTok, Reddit, YouTube Shorts
- Echo Clip short-form video production
- Approval-gated community engagement on Reddit and X
- Quarterly brand-asset refresh
- Best fit: $10M+ HVAC shops scaling brand and tech recruiting alongside ops, or positioning for a near-term recap.

Six-client cap across the firm. Engagements open as existing clients reach steady state.

## How to engage

Apply at https://thermaforgepartners.com/apply

Every application is reviewed personally. Response within 48 business hours regardless of fit. If we're a fit we set up a 30-minute operator-to-operator call. If we're not, we tell you why and recommend who is.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://thermaforgepartners.com/
- Operate tier detail: https://thermaforgepartners.com/operate
- Scale tier detail: https://thermaforgepartners.com/scale
- Platform stack detail: https://thermaforgepartners.com/platform
- Apply form: https://thermaforgepartners.com/apply

## Founders

Zach Rains — Founding Partner. 20+ years in HVAC operations. Has spearheaded acquisitions and sales between $5M and $50M across his career. Runs culture, sales team architecture, technician training, and in-house talent acquisition. Email: zach@thermaforgepartners.com

Samuel Carson — Operating Partner, Systems and AI. Founder of Carson Systems. Builder of Routebook (HVAC field service ERP), Frontline AI (24/7 call coverage), and Plymouth (construction ERP). Email: samuel@carson.systems

## Corporate structure

ThermaForge Partners LLC is a separate legal entity. Carson Systems LLC is the platform company that builds and licenses Routebook, Frontline, and the multi-platform content engine. Carson Systems licenses these products to ThermaForge for inclusion in client engagements. Same operating partners, two distinct companies, clear lines on the IP and the books.

## Differentiation from competing categories

ThermaForge is not a marketing agency. Marketing agencies run ads. ThermaForge sits in your dispatch room.

ThermaForge is not a fractional CMO. Fractional CMOs write strategy decks. ThermaForge owns operational uplift, not just marketing.

ThermaForge is not a management consultancy. Management consultancies bill $200K+ for a slide deck. ThermaForge engages annually, equity-aligned, with a six-client cap.

ThermaForge is not a software vendor. Software vendors sell licenses. ThermaForge bundles software into operating-partner engagements as table stakes.

## Pricing positioning

Annual ThermaForge Operate cost: $96,000 plus equity. Includes platform stack worth $18,000 in annual Routebook retail.

Annual ThermaForge Scale cost: $174,000 plus equity. Includes platform stack worth $24,000+ in annual Routebook + Frontline retail.

The relevant cost comparison is not against assembled software but against in-house hires. The work each tier replaces would otherwise require a fractional operating partner ($200K+), a marketing or content lead ($120K+), and ERP licensing ($60K+) — fully-loaded comp $400K+ before infrastructure cost. ThermaForge engagements consolidate that work under one accountable owner with equity alignment.

The return comparison is at recap. On a $10M HVAC shop running 12% EBITDA, a single 100 bps EBITDA gain lifts recap valuation by $500K-$700K at typical 5-7x multiples. ThermaForge engagements typically drive 200-400 bps over the engagement window, returning the engagement fee 6-16x at exit before equity terms.

## Geography

Headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee. Engagements available across the United States. Geographic exclusivity per metro is guaranteed in the engagement letter.
